hero.title: Our <primary>Solutions</primary>
hero.subtitle: AI-powered workflows designed for service businesses. Mix and match to create your perfect automation stack.

receptionist-ai.title: Receptionist AI
receptionist-ai.description: An always-on AI receptionist that answers calls and messages, gives information, and books, modifies or cancels reservations and appointments.

missed-call-auto-callback.title: Missed Call Auto Callback
missed-call-auto-callback.description: Automatically calls back or messages missed callers so you recover bookings and leads instead of losing them.

appointment-reminder.title: Appointment Reminder
appointment-reminder.description: Automatic reminders via SMS, WhatsApp, email or calls before an appointment, with confirmation and one-click reschedule or cancel.

smart-pre-check-in.title: Smart Pre-Check-In
smart-pre-check-in.description: Pre-visit workflow to collect data, forms and preferences and send tailored instructions before the client arrives.

no-show-recovery-fee-capture.title: No-Show Recovery & Fee Capture
no-show-recovery-fee-capture.description: When a client doesn’t show up, automatically follows up to reschedule, charge a fee or deposit when applicable, and log the event.

smart-waitlist-cancellation-filler.title: Smart Waitlist & Cancellation Filler
smart-waitlist-cancellation-filler.description: Uses cancellations or empty slots to automatically reach out to a waitlist or recent customers and fill those gaps.

abandoned-booking-follow-up.title: Abandoned Booking Follow-Up
abandoned-booking-follow-up.description: If someone starts but doesn’t finish a booking or request, this workflow reaches out to help them complete it.

reactivation-recalls.title: Reactivation & Recalls
reactivation-recalls.description: Brings back inactive customers and triggers periodic recalls based on time since last visit or treatment schedule.

review-booster.title: Review Booster
review-booster.description: After a positive experience, asks for a review and routes happy clients to Google/portals while handling negative feedback privately.

billing-and-invoice.title: Billing & Invoice
billing-and-invoice.description: Automates sending payment links, capturing deposits, and delivering invoices, integrated with your billing system.

in-stay-concierge-upsell.title: In-Stay Concierge & Upsell
in-stay-concierge-upsell.description: A virtual concierge for guests currently staying at the property: answers questions, handles requests and proposes upsells.

group-event-inquiry-handler.title: Group & Event Inquiry Handler
group-event-inquiry-handler.description: Specialised workflow for handling group and event requests (weddings, conferences, corporate stays), qualifying and structuring them for sales.

portal-lead-qualification-routing.title: Portal Lead Qualification & Routing
portal-lead-qualification-routing.description: Handles leads from property portals, qualifies them and routes them to the right agent/property with booked viewings when possible.

viewing-follow-up-offer-collector.title: Viewing Follow-Up & Offer Collector
viewing-follow-up-offer-collector.description: After a property viewing, follows up to gather feedback, check interest level, and collect offers or applications.

tenant-onboarding-docs-collection.title: Tenant Onboarding & Docs Collection
tenant-onboarding-docs-collection.description: Orchestrates the journey from ‘accepted tenant’ to ‘moved in’: documents, contract, payments and key handover instructions.

hero.title: Take the first step toward a <primary>business</primary> that <secondary>never stops</secondary>
hero.subtitle: We listen, understand your day to day and create a system that works for you, even when you can’t.

intro.title: Tell us your story
intro.desc: Every business has its rhythm. We want to understand yours: how you work, what holds you back and what you’d like to change.

call.title: We design your system
call.desc: We automate the tasks that waste your time—calls, appointments, messages—so your day revolves around what truly matters again.

launch.title: Start to breathe
launch.desc: While you keep serving your customers, the system takes care of the rest. No stress, no interruptions, no lost revenue.

assessment.cardSubtitle: No commitment. Just a conversation to discover how your business can gain time, order and peace of mind.

goals.label: What are you looking for?
goals.placeholder: Briefly tell us what you’d like to achieve...

assessment.disclaimer: We work with real businesses that need time to enjoy what they do again, without stopping growth.

success.title: Thanks! We’ve received your request.
success.body: Our team will contact you shortly to schedule your free call.

assessment.serverErrorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.title: Real cases. <primary>Companies that look like yours</primary>.
hero.subtitle: Instead of a form that spits out a PDF, we show you how companies like yours are already working with us. If you want to dig deeper, let's talk.

partnerships.subtitle: We partner with <primary>innovative companies</primary> to deliver <accent>exceptional solutions</accent>

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from teams that transformed their operations with Prozeso.
testimonials.moreComing: And many more stories on the way. These are just a few of the teams we're working with.

1.quote: Since implementing Prozeso at Albet, we've reduced no-shows by 40%, and thanks to automated appointment reminders, our clients arrive far more consistently and on time.
1.name: Pere Coma

2.quote: Ever since we started using Prozeso, we've stopped losing time to phone calls. It handles over 20 calls a day, even when we're closed, so we can focus on our real passion: giving every client our full attention. Plus, the automatic waiting list is a total game-changer.
2.name: Eva Mayoral

3.quote: We've been building structures for over 35 years, but managing calls and follow-ups was eating into time we needed on-site. Since we implemented Prozeso, our office team focuses on what matters: coordinating projects, not chasing phone calls.
3.name: José Antonio González

4.quote: We handle hundreds of inquiries from distributors and hardware stores every week. With Prozeso, requests for catalogs, stock availability, and delivery timelines are resolved automatically. Our sales team now focuses on closing deals, not answering the same questions over and over.
4.name: Andrés Peralta

5.quote: Our distributor network needs fast answers on orders, lead times, and technical specs. Since we activated Prozeso, response time has dropped dramatically and distributor satisfaction has gone up. Less friction, more sales.
5.name: Andrés Peralta

6.quote: If you have a service business and feel stuck in the day-to-day operations, talk to Prozeso. They start with a free assessment, understand your business, and propose automations that pay for themselves in weeks. For us, it's been a game-changer. Now Novify is scaling up, but without losing what makes us unique: the human element.
6.name: Angélica Ortega

7.quote: With Prozeso, we've transformed Albet's logistics: we now resolve warehouse incidents in real time, reducing errors and optimizing every operation seamlessly.
7.name: Carles Viladecans

8.quote: At Can Cuinat, we've been able to process new leads and qualify them using Prozeso, even when we're away from the office. This ensures we don't miss opportunities, we can respond promptly, and we maintain a consistent flow of interested contacts. It is, without question, vital for our business expansion.
8.name: Ezequiel Garcia

9.quote: Since working with Prozeso, we've streamlined all communication around our events. We now handle messages and requests automatically across all channels, even outside business hours, without overwhelming the team. This allows us to focus on the experience and scale events with a much more efficient operation, improving attendee management and overall occupancy.
9.name: Eric Alvarez

10.quote: With Prozeso, HoHomes has scaled lead generation and automated guest check-ins and check-outs, reducing operational friction and elevating the customer experience in Barcelona.
10.name: Miquel Sesplugues

11.quote: Through our partnership with Prozeso.com, we automate qualified lead generation with enterprise-grade security, speed, and full traceability.
11.name: Samuel Pablos

automationSuite.title: We start with one piece. We end up as the <highlight>backbone</highlight>.
automationSuite.subtitle: We come in where the pain is sharp and the ROI is immediate. By month 18, your company runs on Prozeso.
automationSuite.automationPickCta: Choose the ones that best fit your needs

bookings.name: Bookings
bookings.shortDescription: Bookings, reminders and reschedules on autopilot. Fill the calendar without anyone on the phone.

0.name: Receptionist AI
0.subtitle: Voice & WhatsApp
0.problem: Businesses lose between 30% and 40% of booking requests outside of business hours.
0.solution: A 24/7 AI agent handles bookings via voice (phone call) and WhatsApp. It understands natural language, confirms the details, and logs the appointment directly in the business calendar — no human intervention needed.
0.benefits: 24/7 availability · Includes weekends and holidays · Response in seconds · Multilingual · Integrates with Google Calendar, Calendly, and CRM

1.name: Appointment Reminder
1.subtitle: SMS / Email / WhatsApp
1.problem: Unjustified no-shows represent an average loss of 15-20% of revenue in appointment or booking-based businesses.
1.solution: A multichannel reminder system that contacts the client 48 hours, 24 hours, and 1 hour before the appointment. The client confirms, cancels, or reschedules with a single click — no need to call.
1.benefits: Automatic waitlist management · Up to 80% reduction in unjustified no-shows · No manual intervention from reception staff

2.name: Review Booster
2.subtitle: Online Reputation
2.problem: Only 5% of satisfied clients leave a review spontaneously, while 60% of unsatisfied ones do.
2.solution: After each appointment or service, the system automatically sends a personalized message to the client. If the rating is positive, it redirects them to Google or Trustpilot. If negative, it channels them to an internal feedback channel to act before it gets published.
2.benefits: 5× more positive reviews on Google · Early dissatisfaction detection · Improved local SEO ranking · Boost in organic referrals
2.impact: × 5 positive reviews on Google in 90 days

3.name: Smart Reschedule
3.subtitle: Smart Calendar
3.problem: Every cancellation means idle time that generates no revenue. Filling those gaps manually is slow and depends on staff availability.
3.solution: When a cancellation is detected, the system automatically notifies waitlisted clients in real time. If no one takes the slot, it fills it with prioritized internal tasks.
3.benefits: 70-80% recovery of cancelled slots · Priority experience for waitlisted clients · No manual intervention · Integration with any calendar system

sales.name: Sales
sales.shortDescription: Prospecting, scoring and follow-up. The team spends time closing, not chasing.
sales.tagline: Automations that empower your sales team, from prospecting to closing, eliminating repetitive tasks and accelerating the sales cycle.

0.name: Outreach AI
0.subtitle: Prospecting
0.problem: Manual prospecting on LinkedIn, email, and phone consumes 40% of sales time with inconsistent results.
0.solution: An automatic prospecting system that identifies leads matching your ideal customer profile, generates AI-personalized messages, and launches multichannel sequences. Every reply automatically updates your CRM.
0.benefits: Ability to contact 10x more prospects in the same time · Personalization at scale without sacrificing message quality · Automatic A/B testing on sequences and messages
0.impact: × 10 prospecting volume without growing the team

1.name: Lead Scoring
1.subtitle: CRM
1.problem: Reps waste time on cold leads while hot leads don't receive immediate attention, reducing conversion rates.
1.solution: An automatic scoring engine that analyzes lead behavior (pages visited, emails opened, downloads) and scores them in real time. Automatic alert to the rep when a lead crosses the closing threshold so they can reach out at peak receptivity.
1.benefits: Sales team works only with ready-to-buy leads · Fully objective pipeline prioritization · Shorter sales cycle by acting at key moments

2.name: Follow-up Bot
2.subtitle: Nurturing
2.problem: 80% of sales require between 5 and 12 follow-ups. Most reps give up after 1-2 attempts.
2.solution: An intelligent follow-up system that detects silent leads in your CRM and launches personalized reactivation sequences via email, WhatsApp, or LinkedIn, adapting to the context of each lead's previous conversation.
2.benefits: No lead is lost due to lack of follow-up · Contextual messages that pick up the conversation · Auto-disengagement after N unanswered attempts

3.name: Auto Proposal
3.subtitle: Closing
3.problem: Personalized commercial proposals can take between 2 and 4 hours per client, delaying closing and the perception of agility.
3.solution: With one click from your CRM, the system extracts client data, the service of interest, and conversation context to generate a professional PDF proposal, personalized with the client's business context.
3.benefits: Proposal time reduced from hours to minutes · Visual and messaging consistency across all proposals · Automatic sending with open and read tracking

finance.name: Finance
finance.shortDescription: Invoicing, collections, reconciliation and budget alerts. Month-end close without surprises.
finance.tagline: Automations that eliminate financial administrative burden, guarantee timely collection, and offer full visibility into the company's financial health.

0.name: Auto Invoicing
0.subtitle: Accounting
0.problem: Manual invoicing is slow, error-prone, and creates collection delays with a direct impact on cash flow.
0.solution: When a service is completed, a project milestone approved, or a delivery confirmed, the system generates the invoice, sends it to the client, logs it in accounting, and updates collection status in real time.
0.benefits: Instant invoicing with no human intervention · Automatic sync with your accounting software (Holded, QuickBooks, Xero, etc.) · Total elimination of manual errors in tax data

1.name: Collections & Reminders
1.subtitle: Cash Flow
1.problem: 30% of invoices are paid late simply because the client forgot. Chasing payments manually is uncomfortable and consumes hours from the finance team.
1.solution: An escalating sequence of automatic reminders that adapts to each invoice's status: friendly, formal, and urgent. If there's no response, it escalates to the finance manager with full context.
1.benefits: 40% reduction in DSO (Days Sales Outstanding) · No awkward conversations with clients · Real-time pending invoices dashboard with cash flow forecasting

2.name: Bank Reconciliation
2.subtitle: Financial Control
2.problem: Manual bank reconciliation can take days each month and is one of the highest error-risk tasks in the accounting cycle.
2.solution: Real-time connection between your bank account and accounting software. The system automatically matches every transaction against issued and received invoices, identifies discrepancies, and alerts on unrecognized movements.
2.benefits: Real-time reconciliation, not end-of-month · Automatic detection of discrepancies and suspicious movements · Books always up to date without manual intervention

3.name: Budget Alerts
3.subtitle: Budgeting
3.problem: Departments exceed their budgets without knowing until month-end close, when there's no room to react.
3.solution: A real-time spend monitoring system that alerts at 70%, 85%, and 100% of budget to the department manager and CFO, with detailed breakdowns and end-of-month projections.
3.benefits: Full real-time spend visibility · Ability to react before exceeding budget · Culture of financial accountability across the organization

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.shortDescription: Content, email and social that scale without growing the team.
marketing.tagline: Automations that multiply the reach and impact of your marketing team without increasing resources, from content creation to multichannel campaign management.

0.name: Content Factory AI
0.subtitle: Content
0.problem: Creating quality content for blog, social media, and newsletters consumes between 15 and 25 hours per week from the marketing team.
0.solution: An automated pipeline that, from a topic or keyword, generates SEO articles, adapts them to LinkedIn, Instagram, and Twitter, creates the newsletter subject and body, and schedules publication at peak engagement times.
0.benefits: 10x content production without growing the team · Consistent voice and tone across all channels · Automatic SEO optimization on every piece of content

1.name: Email Marketing Automation
1.subtitle: Email
1.problem: Generic email campaigns have 15-20% open rates. Manual personalization at scale is impossible.
1.solution: An email marketing system with dynamic segmentation and AI-powered personalization. Each subscriber receives content tailored to their behavior. Automated sequences triggered by user actions.
1.benefits: Open rate increase from 15% to 35-40% · Automatic 24/7 nurturing without intervention · Continuous A/B testing on subjects, content, and timing

2.name: Social Listening & Response
2.subtitle: Community
2.problem: 53% of clients expect a response on social media in under 1 hour. Monitoring and responding manually is unsustainable at scale.
2.solution: Continuous automatic monitoring of mentions, comments, and direct messages across all networks. AI classifies by sentiment and priority, automatically answers FAQs, and escalates to the social & community manager only what requires human attention.
2.benefits: Response time reduced from hours to minutes · Early reputation crisis detection · Real-time sentiment dashboard

3.name: Campaign ROI Tracker
3.subtitle: Analytics
3.problem: Measuring the real ROI of each campaign requires manually cross-referencing data from multiple platforms. Most teams don't know which campaigns are profitable.
3.solution: A centralized dashboard that automatically aggregates data from Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, email, and organic in real time. Calculates cost per lead, CPA, and ROAS per channel. Generates alerts when a campaign falls below the profitability threshold.
3.benefits: 360 view of marketing performance in one place · Automatic alerts on performance drops · Weekly reports generated and sent without intervention

customerSuccess.name: Customer Success
customerSuccess.shortDescription: Onboarding, churn prediction and upsell. Keep and grow accounts without chasing them.
customerSuccess.tagline: Automations that maximize retention, customer lifetime value, and satisfaction, turning clients into brand ambassadors.

0.name: Client Onboarding Flow
0.subtitle: Activation
0.problem: Poor onboarding is the leading cause of churn in the first 90 days. 60% of clients who leave do so because they never properly used the product or service.
0.solution: An automated onboarding flow that guides new clients step by step from sign-up: personalized welcome, guided setup, training at key milestones, automatic check-ins, and Customer Success Manager assignment at the right moment.
0.benefits: 50% churn reduction in the first 90 days · Accelerated time-to-value for every new client · Consistent and scalable onboarding experience

1.name: Churn Prediction & Rescue
1.subtitle: Retention
1.problem: By the time a client says they're leaving, it's already too late to retain them. Warning signs exist weeks before, but go unnoticed.
1.solution: A predictive model that analyzes early warning signals: drop in product usage, reduced interactions, unresolved tickets, and login pattern changes. When the risk threshold is exceeded, it automatically triggers a personalized rescue protocol.
1.benefits: At-risk client detection 30-60 days before churn · CRM protocols alerting the retention team

2.name: Auto Upsell & Cross-sell
2.subtitle: Expansion
2.problem: 70% of expansion revenue is lost because the right moment to offer a higher plan or additional service is not identified.
2.solution: A system that monitors each client's behavior and usage milestones. When they hit plan limits, accumulate success with a service, or have gone X months without expanding, it automatically launches the most relevant expansion offer for their profile.
2.benefits: Expansion opportunities identified and triggered automatically · Personalized offer at the moment of greatest receptivity

3.name: NPS & Feedback Loop
3.subtitle: Satisfaction
3.problem: Satisfaction surveys are done once a year, when problems have already become entrenched. There's no real visibility into how clients feel, nor the ability to respond in time.
3.solution: Continuous NPS and satisfaction measurement at key points in the cycle: after onboarding, each support interaction, renewals, and usage milestones. Negative responses trigger an immediate CSM alert. Positive ones automatically request a testimonial or referral.
3.benefits: Real-time satisfaction pulse, not annual · Loop closed with every dissatisfied client within 24 hours · Automatic testimonial generation from promoter clients · Correlation between NPS and retention metrics

operations.name: Operations
operations.shortDescription: Vendors, deliveries, maintenance and SLAs. Coordinated operations without Excel or WhatsApp.
operations.tagline: Automations that optimize the operational chain, supplier management, and logistics, reducing costs and eliminating bottlenecks in day-to-day processes.

0.name: Vendor Management
0.subtitle: Procurement
0.problem: Manual vendor management (RFQs, comparisons, orders, follow-ups) creates inconsistencies in terms and pricing.
0.solution: An automated flow that handles the full procurement cycle: requests quotes from approved vendors, automatically compares offers, generates purchase orders with threshold-based approvals, and tracks deliveries and invoices.
0.benefits: 50% reduction in procurement cycle · Negotiated terms consistently applied · Full traceability of every order from request to delivery

1.name: Delivery Tracking
1.subtitle: Logistics
1.problem: 30% of logistics incidents are detected after the client has already complained. Lack of proactive visibility generates claims, returns, and loss of trust.
1.solution: A centralized tracking system that aggregates the real-time status of all shipments across all carriers in a single dashboard. Detects delays and lost shipments, proactively notifies the client, and triggers the incident protocol before they ask.
1.benefits: 360 visibility of all shipments in a single dashboard · Proactive client communication on any incident · Automatic carrier KPIs for future negotiations

2.name: Preventive Maintenance
2.subtitle: Assets
2.problem: Unexpected machinery or equipment breakdowns cost between 5 and 10 times more than preventive maintenance.
2.solution: A maintenance management system that automatically schedules preventive reviews based on usage, operating hours, or calendar. Generates work orders, assigns the available technician, records the history, and alerts when an asset nears end of life.
2.benefits: 70% reduction in unexpected breakdowns · Automatic warranty and regulatory compliance · Complete per-asset history accessible in one click

3.name: SLA & Auto Escalation
3.subtitle: Service Quality
3.problem: SLA breaches go unnoticed until the client complains, when the reputational and financial damage is already done.
3.solution: A real-time SLA monitoring system that tracks every ticket or task with a defined time commitment. When a request approaches the deadline unresolved, it triggers escalating reminders and automatically escalates to the next level with full context.
3.benefits: SLA compliance above 98% · Automatic escalation without relying on human initiative · Full traceability of every active commitment's status

management.name: Management
management.shortDescription: Reports, OKRs and actionable alerts. Decisions backed by data, not gut feel.
management.tagline: Automations that digitize and optimize internal processes for team management, operations, and data-driven decision making.

0.name: Geolocated Check-in
0.subtitle: HR / Compliance
0.problem: Manual attendance tracking is prone to errors and fraud. Labor inspections require reliable digital time records.
0.solution: An automatic check-in system with real-time GPS validation. Employees clock in from their phone and the system instantly verifies location and time. Generates alerts for absences or anomalies.
0.benefits: 100% compliance with time-tracking regulations · Attendance fraud and irregularity detection · Automatic reports by employee, site, and period · Direct integration with payroll and shift management

1.name: Task Dispatcher
1.subtitle: Productivity
1.problem: Manual task assignment consumes management time and often doesn't account for each employee's actual workload.
1.solution: An intelligent dispatcher that distributes tasks based on real-time availability, skills, priority, and current workload. Detects bottlenecks, automatically redistributes, and notifies each assigned employee.
1.benefits: 60% reduction in time spent on manual assignment · Balanced workloads across the team · Automatic prioritization and reassignment on blockers

2.name: Auto Report
2.subtitle: Business Intelligence
2.problem: Preparing weekly or monthly KPI reports takes between 2 and 8 hours per report, depending on business complexity.
2.solution: An automatic generator that gathers data from all your connected sources (CRM, ERP, Google Analytics, spreadsheets, etc.), cross-references them, and produces a ready-to-send document automatically to configured recipients.
2.benefits: Reports delivered without human intervention · Data always up to date and consistent · Customizable formats by department or executive

3.name: Onboarding Flow
3.subtitle: HR
3.problem: Manual onboarding of new employees is inconsistent, slow, and creates a negative experience that impacts retention and initial productivity.
3.solution: A fully automated onboarding flow that, from the moment a new hire is registered, sends documentation, assigns equipment, schedules training, and generates access credentials.
3.benefits: Onboarding time reduced from weeks to days · Consistent experience for all new employees · Automatic progress tracking during the first 90 days

hr.name: HR & Recruitment
hr.shortDescription: Hiring, onboarding, time tracking and offboarding. HR scales without growing headcount in lockstep.
hr.tagline: Automations that accelerate talent acquisition, improve the candidate experience, and free the HR team from repetitive administrative tasks.

0.name: AI Resume Screening
0.subtitle: Selection
0.problem: An active hiring process generates between 50 and 200 resumes. Screening them manually takes 2-4 hours per position and is subject to bias.
0.solution: An automatic screening system that analyzes each resume, compares it against the position profile, and generates a relevance-ranked list of candidates. Filters by experience, skills, education, and cultural fit.
0.benefits: 2-4 hours saved on screening per position · Objective evaluation free from unconscious bias · Top 10 candidates ranked in under 24 hours · Duplicate and previously-seen profile filtering

1.name: Candidate Nurturing
1.subtitle: Candidate Experience
1.problem: 60% of candidates abandon a hiring process due to lack of communication. The employer brand deteriorates with every ignored candidate.
1.solution: An automated flow that keeps candidates informed at every stage: application receipt confirmation, phase progression, post-interview feedback, and personalized final result communication.
1.benefits: Process abandonment rate reduced by 50% · Employer brand strengthened with every process · Automatic personalized feedback to every candidate

2.name: AI Pre-screening Interview
2.subtitle: Evaluation
2.problem: Phone screening interviews consume 15-30 minutes per candidate. With 50 candidates per position, that's over 15 hours of team time.
2.solution: An AI conversational agent that conducts pre-screening interviews via voice or chat, validating availability, salary expectations, motivation, and core competencies. Generates a structured report per candidate.
2.benefits: Total elimination of manual screening interviews · Standardized and comparable reports across candidates

3.name: Automated Offboarding
3.subtitle: Exit Management
3.problem: Reactively managed employee departures create security risks, knowledge loss, and legal issues.
3.solution: An offboarding protocol that activates automatically when a departure is registered: access revocation, equipment recovery, automated exit interview, knowledge transfer, and legal compliance checklist.
3.benefits: Zero active accesses for former employees within 24 hours · Legally and documentarily backed process · Systematic knowledge capture before departure · Reduced post-departure security risk

stock.name: Inventory
stock.shortDescription: Reordering, alerts, liquidation and demand forecasting. Inventory that runs itself.
stock.tagline: Automations that ensure optimal product availability, eliminate dead stock, and turn inventory management into a predictive, frictionless process.

0.name: Auto Replenishment
0.subtitle: Inventory
0.problem: Stockouts cost an average of 4-8% of annual sales. Detecting them manually is usually too late.
0.solution: The system monitors each product's level in real time. When an item falls below the defined threshold, it automatically generates a replenishment order to the supplier with optimal quantities.
0.benefits: Zero stockouts due to lack of monitoring · Purchase orders automatically generated with the right quantities

1.name: Stock Alerts & Anomalies
1.subtitle: Inventory Control
1.problem: Discrepancies between physical and recorded stock go unnoticed until an audit or a customer complaint, when the damage is already done.
1.solution: A real-time alert system that automatically detects inventory anomalies: differences between physical and digital stock, unusual movements, shrinkage above normal thresholds, and upcoming expirations. Notifies the responsible person with full context for immediate action.
1.benefits: Discrepancy detection in hours, not months · Loss reduction from theft or administrative errors · Data ready for audits and inventory closings

2.name: Dead Stock Liquidation
2.subtitle: Margin Optimization
2.problem: Product sitting for over 90 days ties up capital and takes up space. Most companies detect it late and end up selling at a loss or simply discarding it.
2.solution: Weekly identification of products with low turnover based on age and trend. Before they lose all value, it alerts the sales team to offer progressive discounts, bundles, or liquidation campaigns.
2.benefits: Proactive identification of stock at risk of obsolescence · Partial value recovery before total loss

3.name: AI Demand Forecasting
3.subtitle: Planning
3.problem: Forecasts based on intuition or simple historical data generate overstock in some products and stockouts in others, penalizing margin and customer satisfaction.
3.solution: A predictive engine that analyzes sales history, seasonality, market trends, planned marketing campaigns, and external factors to automatically generate an optimized purchasing plan.
3.benefits: Lower costs and less tied-up product · Continuous model refinement with each sales cycle

customerService.name: Customer Service
customerService.shortDescription: Handle customer questions with human quality 24/7. Bots resolve routine queries and escalate when it matters.
customerService.tagline: Customer service without growing the support team.

product.name: Product
product.shortDescription: Usage, feedback and prioritization with data. Build what evidence supports, not gut feel.
product.tagline: Product guided by evidence, not by the loudest voice in the room.

it.name: IT
it.shortDescription: Access, devices and internal support. Fewer repetitive tickets, more time for what matters.
it.tagline: The back-office that keeps IT from becoming the bottleneck.

legal.name: Legal
legal.shortDescription: Templates, reviews and compliance. Legal stops being the bottleneck on every deal.
legal.tagline: Legal that supports the operation, not the one that slows it down.

finalCta.title: Ready to <highlight>automate</highlight>?
finalCta.subtitle: Start your free assessment today. See exactly which automations will transform your business.

understanding.title: Three layers. <highlight>One backbone</highlight>.
understanding.subtitle: Not a tool. The way your company operates.

input.title: Input layer
input.desc: Voice, chat, WhatsApp, email, forms, integrations. Any event your company cares about enters where the customer or the team already is. Without asking anyone to change how they work.

orchestration.title: Orchestration layer
orchestration.desc: Multi-tenant workflows, business logic, rules, integrations. The core that connects your ERP, your CRM, your channels and your team. What turns scattered events into coordinated operations.

intelligence.title: Intelligence layer
intelligence.desc: Reports, alerts, predictions, optimizations. Decisions, not just tasks executed. What justifies you still paying us at month 12, not just month 2.

trust.title: Your data, on your side.
trust.desc: European infrastructure, encryption in transit and at rest, full export at any moment with no penalty. GDPR compliant by design.

metadata.title: About Us — Prozeso
metadata.description: Meet the team behind Prozeso. Born at Google Dublin to close the gap between Excel and SAP for companies of 10 to 200 employees.

hero.title: The story behind <highlight>Prozeso</highlight>
hero.subtitle: We met at Google's offices in Dublin with a clear vision: companies that have outgrown Excel but don't want to move into SAP are underserved. On October 7, 2025, Prozeso was born to fix that.
hero.originParagraph1: Three professionals: marketing, engineering, and strategy. Comparing notes in Dublin. We agreed on something: there's a gap between Excel and SAP that no ERP on the market solves well.
hero.originParagraph2: Spanish companies of 10 to 200 employees, with processes living in people's heads, spreadsheets, and WhatsApp messages. Products like Holded, Odoo or Zoho cover part of the ground, but they're rigid and generic. And moving into NetSuite isn't an option, not on cost, not on implementation time, not on the IT team you'd need to sustain the project.
hero.originParagraph3: That day we decided to build the operating system that company never had. On October 7, 2025 we officially launched Prozeso.

team.title: The team
team.subtitle: Three co-founders, one mission: build the operating system small and mid-sized businesses never had.

ceo.name: Cristian Guzmán
ceo.description: Leads customer conversations and the commercial direction. Previously in marketing, now selling what he himself decided was the problem.

cto.name: Alejandro González
cto.description: Designs and maintains the platform. Previously an engineer in banking and consumer products, now building the operating system small and mid-sized businesses never had.

sales.name: Carles Vineta
sales.description: Backs the commercial strategy. 30+ years in operations at companies like the ones we serve. Makes sure the decisions hold up in reality, not just on the slide.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.text: This Legal Notice governs the use of the website prozeso.com, whose purpose is to provide information about Prozeso's AI automation services for service businesses, and to allow contact and contracting of such services.

useConditions.title: Use conditions

The user agrees to make diligent use of the site and services in accordance with the law, morality, and public order.

Reproduction, distribution, public communication, or transformation of such content without the express authorization of the owner is prohibited.

Prozeso will not be liable for damages arising from the use of or inability to use the site, nor for third-party content accessible through it.

contact.title: Contact

overview.title: Overview
overview.text: This Privacy Policy explains how Prozeso ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and shares information about you when you use our website and services.

dataWeCollect.title: Data we collect
items: Contact information such as name, email address, and phone number.
Usage information such as pages visited, features used, and actions taken.
Device and log information such as IP address, browser type, and settings.

howWeUseData.title: How we use data
items: To provide, maintain, and improve our services.
To communicate with you, including marketing and transactional messages.
To ensure security, prevent fraud, and enforce our policies.

sharing.title: Sharing your information
sharing.text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with service providers who perform services on our behalf, in accordance with contracts that protect your data.

dataRetention.title: Data retention
dataRetention.text: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

yourRights.title: Your rights
yourRights.text: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Questions or requests regarding this policy can be sent to privacy@prozeso.com.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.text: Cookies are small text files placed on your device to store data that can be recalled by a web server in the domain that placed the cookie. We use cookies and similar technologies to provide and improve our services.

howWeUseCookies.title: How we use cookies
items: Authentication and session management.
Remembering your preferences and settings.
Analytics to understand how our services are used.
Marketing to deliver relevant content.

typesOfCookies.title: Types of cookies we use
items: Essential cookies — required to operate the site.
Performance/analytics cookies — help us analyze usage.
Functional cookies — remember your preferences.
Advertising cookies — used to deliver relevant ads.

manageCookies.title: How to manage cookies
manageCookies.text: You can control and manage cookies in your browser settings. Please note that removing or blocking cookies may impact your experience and some features may no longer be available.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.text: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time. We encourage you to review this page periodically for any changes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions about this Cookies Policy, contact us at privacy@prozeso.com.

agreement.title: Agreement to terms
agreement.text: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement made between you and Prozeso regarding your access to and use of this website and any related services. By accessing the site, you agree that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by all of these Terms.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property rights
intellectualProperty.text: Unless otherwise indicated, the Site and all source code, databases, functionality, software, website designs, audio, video, text, photographs, and graphics on the Site are owned or controlled by us and are protected by copyright and trademark laws.

userRepresentations.title: User representations
userRepresentations.text: By using the Site, you represent and warrant that all registration information you submit will be true, accurate, current, and complete; you will maintain the accuracy of such information and promptly update such information as necessary.

prohibitedActivities.title: Prohibited activities
items: Systematically retrieve data or content to create a collection or database.
Trick, defraud, or mislead us and other users.
Circumvent, disable, or interfere with security-related features.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of liability
limitationOfLiability.text: In no event shall we or our suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the Site.

governingLaw.title: Governing law
governingLaw.text: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction where Prozeso is established, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contactUs.title: Contact us
contactUs.text: If you have questions or comments about these Terms, please contact us at support@prozeso.com.
